history_boundaries: history/ is a public index over repo-preserved evidence, not a verbatim transcript of every chat message.
All tracked docs/reports, handoffs, ad hoc review notes, structured revision rounds, and release packages are discoverable from this map.
Older work is sometimes represented by catch-up revision rounds plus the underlying docs/reports artifacts rather than one directory per micro-goal.
Git history remains the authoritative record for exact code diffs and commits.

top_revision_rounds.summary: RTDL v0.8 Stage-1 proximity apps now have bounded Linux timing characterization across RTDL backends, with correctness passing and no external-baseline speedup claim.
top_revision_rounds.title: Goal524 v0.8 Stage-1 proximity Linux performance

top_revision_rounds.summary: RTDL v0.8 public tutorial/example command surface now has Linux validation: 88 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped across available RTDL backends, with robot Vulkan gap preserved.
top_revision_rounds.title: Goal523 v0.8 Linux public command validation

top_revision_rounds.summary: RTDL v0.8 final local audit now reflects the six-app scope, full local tests, public command harness, docs, history, and remaining Linux/performance boundary.
top_revision_rounds.title: Goal522 v0.8 scope-refreshed final local audit

top_revision_rounds.summary: RTDL v0.8 app scope is now consensus-gated across all 32 paper workloads, with do-now, already-covered, defer, and reframe decisions plus reasons.
top_revision_rounds.title: Goal521 v0.8 workload scope decision matrix

top_revision_rounds.summary: RTDL v0.8 now includes currently supportable Goal519 Stage-1 proximity apps: ANN candidate search, outlier detection, and DBSCAN clustering using existing RTDL kernels plus Python orchestration.
